subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! In these days of tests and trials, when the tempest hath encompassed the realm of being, supplicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در این ایام افتتان و امتحان که طوفان امکان را احاطه نموده است تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
